calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christopher F. Tutle of the law offices of The Chanler Group (510-848-8880) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health and Safety Code. Written order and Judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Angela Bradstreet; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
